title: BotanicE
description: A very small datapack that makes early-game ProjectE more mid-game through the use of Botania
body:
This is a very small datapack. It changes two recipes in **ProjectE** using **Botania** items.

**Changes made:**
1. Philosopher's Stone now requires a Dragonstone rather than a Diamond
2. In place of the Philosopher's Stone and Stone, crafting a Transmutation Table now takes a Mana Pearl and Livingrock respectively.
